summary: Light calendar today with a review in the morning. Active sprint is behind on 2 tasks that need to ship before Sunday. Three community posts queued. Clear skies in Rijeka. Notable news: Claude 4.7 rumored, Expo SDK 53 beta.

items.title: Community ask: What would your dream running event look like?
items.caption: Tell us — rooftop 5K at sunset? Night trail with glow sticks? Go wild in the replies.

items.title: Founder note · why we rebuilt onboarding

weather.summary: Clear and mild. Light NE breeze along the coast. No precipitation expected.

items.title: Claude 4.7 Opus expected this quarter
items.summary: Anthropic is reportedly preparing a mid-cycle Opus refresh focused on long-horizon agent tasks and tool use reliability.

items.title: Claude Code Cloud Agents now generally available
items.summary: Parallel cloud agents with workspace isolation leave preview. Pricing drops 20% for teams on annual billing.

items.title: Expo SDK 53 beta adds React 19.2 + RSC-on-native preview
items.summary: Server Components run on-device via a new Metro/Hermes bridge. Beta opt-in via expo install --beta.

items.title: React Native 0.79 ships Fabric-only builds
items.summary: The legacy bridge is gone for new templates. Existing apps can still opt in for one more cycle.

items.title: Swift 6.2 approachable concurrency now default in Xcode 27
items.summary: Single-threaded by default with @concurrent opt-in for background work. Most apps compile with zero sendability errors out of the box.

items.title: SwiftUI introduces LazyAdaptiveGrid for dynamic layouts
items.summary: A new container that reflows between columns and rows based on available width, replacing most LazyVGrid/HGrid patterns.
